claim: No Stable, legal-validity, biometric, file-safety, package-parity, or recorded manual Risk Class 3 claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: A visible label names a focusable canvas group; native buttons provide undo/clear and optional keyboard movement; optional text/file alternatives are native fields.
semantics.naming: Visible method, movement, mark, undo, clear, text, file, and caveat labels are localizable.
semantics.roleOverride: Canvas is not exposed as an image-only signature and stored normalized vectors are not called biometric proof.

interaction.keyboard: Focused canvas arrows move a logical cursor with Shift acceleration and RTL mirroring; Enter/Space marks a point; explicit buttons expose movement, mark, undo, and clear when enabled.
interaction.pointer: One primary captured pointer draws a cancellable normalized stroke.
interaction.touch: touch-action is limited to the canvas; typed/file/button alternatives remain outside the gesture surface.
interaction.speech: Visible method and action labels create deterministic targets.
interaction.switchAccess: Optional keyboard-control buttons plus text/file alternatives avoid a canvas-only workflow.

formBehavior: Optional name serializes normalized vector or text JSON; file bytes use a separate native file control. Disabled controls are omitted, reset restores initial value and clears consumer file state callback, and required draw mode uses a native validation proxy that returns focus to the canvas with visible recovery text.

preferences.forcedColors: Canvas, controls, selected method, caveat, and focus retain system colors.
preferences.reducedMotion: Drawing and method changes do not require motion; all descendant duration is removed.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Actions wrap; canvas stays inline-bounded; alternatives remain in reading order.

consumerResponsibilities: Determine legal consent, signer identity, intent, audit, retention, jurisdiction, and evidentiary requirements outside this visual control.
Validate uploaded file signatures/content and authorize storage; never treat vector dynamics as biometrics without a separate reviewed policy.
Enable and test a non-canvas alternative appropriate to the workflow and provide persistent validation recovery.
limitations: This is not identity proof, a biometric system, a legal signature service, or a file scanner.
Complete Risk Class 3 manual, legal review, packed-consumer, and generated parity evidence remains unrecorded.
